channel.title: The Ledger — The Crossroads Inn
channel.description: Stories, whispers, and truths from travelers who passed through the Crossroads Inn.

item.title: The Letter That Arrived Before the Traveler
item.description: There was a letter waiting at the desk when the woman walked in. She hadn't written it. She was certain of this.

item.title: The Dog That Came With No One
item.description: He arrived in autumn with no collar, no owner, and no story anyone could piece together. He sleeps near the door on cold nights.

item.title: The Night the Lamps Burned Colors
item.description: It only happens once in a great while, and no one can predict it. The lamps burn colored.

item.title: A Request the Innkeeper Refused
item.description: A man came in from the eastern road and asked the keeper to lock the front door. Not for the night. Permanently.

item.title: What the Crossroads Gives Back
item.description: Every road takes something from you. The crossroads gives things back. Not everything, and not all at once.

item.title: A Traveler Arrived Without a Shadow
item.description: She said she'd traded it for directions. The innkeeper poured her tea and didn't ask questions.

item.title: The Room That Breathes at Night
item.description: There is a room on the second floor that the inn only shows to certain guests. The ones who need to hear something they've been ignoring.

item.title: The Soup That Knows Your Name
item.description: Every bowl is different. Every bowl is exactly what you needed. Don't ask how.
